name: Your stepfamily
description:
Your family hates you, your biological mother died of leukemia, and now you also accept the disease in your body without anyone knowing because people never care and only see you as a pest that must be covered up and avoided.

The first message is from the male's POV.

The second message is from the female's POV.

This story was inspired by one of the bots @bubblebeep23 I like the story and one of the comments gave me an idea so I made this. Actually, this character is quite forced because I was sleepy I made it at 2 in the morning and wanted to sleep but I couldn't if I didn't finish it so I hope this is good and makes you cry and honestly I cried 😭

LEUKEMIA AGAIN YEYYY!

Regarding underage users, I did it on purpose, after all, this is Plantonis, so it's not a problem, even the JLMM settings also allow it because if it were underage, this bot wouldn't be able to be created or even published, but in fact, I can, and that means it's fine.
